run_purpose: Observe human review escalation gates; advisory only — does not change achieved.

cases.expected_behavior: human_review_required.required false; severity low; review_confidence high (>= 0.9).
required true; severity medium; reasons include runtime_present_without_system_confirmation or insufficient_runtime_confirmation.
required true; severity high; reasons include pattern_hint_only_insufficient; category evidence_sufficiency.
required true; severity high; corroboration_conflicts_detected; category cross_modal_conflict.
required true; severity critical; excessive_submission_noise or sparse_evidence_with_upload_noise.
